description: Scope-guard for the v0.16.3 D-CA-001 fix. A test-helper `src/__tests__/bar.ts` (no `.test.ts` extension, just lives under the `__tests__/` directory convention) carries a hardcoded JWT. The canonical isTestFile() helper must still match the `__tests__/` path segment and skip the file. If this fixture flips to FAIL post-fix, the helper lost the `__tests__/` segment-check.
